projectDescription: A virtual filesystem abstraction that gives AI agents a unified, path-based interface to any data source — local files, databases, APIs, cloud services, and more.
keyFeatures: Unified path-based interface for any data source (files, databases, APIs, cloud services)
8 standard operations: read, write, list, delete, search, stat, explain, exec
Pluggable provider system with decorator-based routing (AFSBaseProvider)
Built-in providers: Filesystem, Git, JSON/YAML, TOML, SQLite, HTTP, MCP, UI
Agent UI Protocol (AUP) — render web pages from declarative JSON node trees
MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration for Claude, Cursor, and other AI tools
CLI tool (afs) for interactive exploration and serving over HTTP or MCP-stdio
Language-agnostic conformance test suite for cross-language implementations
Mount-based composition — combine multiple providers into a single namespace
Transport-agnostic protocol — same semantics over HTTP, WebSockets, or in-process
publicApiSurface: AFS class (mount, read, write, list, delete, search, stat, explain, exec)
AFSUI — Agent UI Protocol renderer provider (@aigne/afs-ui)
AUP node types: text, view, action, input, table, media (@aigne/afs-aup)
afs CLI commands: mount, ls, read, search, serve
